title: Scheduled posts omit media attachments in federation
description: In delivery.rs create_scheduled_post() (around line 504-524), the Create{Note} activity built for scheduled posts does not include an 'attachment' field. The main posting path in posting.rs (lines 1155-1217) correctly queries media and includes 'attachment': &ap_attachments. Scheduled posts with attached media will be delivered to remote servers without the media. Fix: query media rows for the post and build the attachment array, same as posting.rs does.
